caption: A man wearing a white shirt, dark vest, and glasses stands at a podium, speaking to a seated audience in a room with brown blinds and dark wood paneling. Several people are seated in blue chairs facing him, including a woman in a blue and white striped shirt, another in a yellow top, and a man in a plaid shirt. A woman in a red garment is seated near the speaker. The scene remains largely static across the sequence, with the speaker and audience members maintaining their positions. A white rectangular overlay in the lower right of the frame contains the text "ORCA". A small white sign is visible on the left wall, and a red sign is on the right wall. The lighting is consistent, and the camera angle remains fixed throughout the clip.
